titleStmt.title: SII 26.344: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 344. (A.R. No. 325 of 1909.) KŪVAM, TIRUVALLORE TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

p.hi: Chakravartin Śrī-Kulōttuṅgachōḷadēva I: Year lost: C. 1090 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription is built in the middle. Its date portion is lost, but the date must be after the 20th year as this year is quoted in the text.

It starts with the praśasti of the king, Pugaḻśūḻnda puṇari, etc. It states that some land, probably in Rājarājanallūr, which was gifted as iṟaiyili by purchase from Veḷippākiḻāṉ Dēvaṉ Śāttan alias Rājēndrapallavaraiyaṉ, was not in use since the 20th year of the king owing to the disappearance and death of certain Perumbākkiḻāṉ Aḍigaḷ Vēṅkaḍam. Therefore, some of his lands, totalling in extent to 1339 kuḻi and 4(1/2) mā. were gifted to provide for offerings to the temple probably of Tiruviṟkōlamuḍaiyār.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻcūḻnta puṇari Akaḻcūḻnta puviyiṟ poṉṉemiyaḷavun taṉṉemi naṭappa viḷaṅku jayamakaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuvattu cakkarakoṭṭattu vikkiramat toḻilāṟ putumaṇam puṇarntu Urimaiyiṟ cūṭittan ṉaṭiyiraṇṭu n=taṭamuṭiyākat tonṉilaven=tar cūṭa munṉai maṉuvāṟu perukakkaliyāṟu vaṟuppac ceṅkol ticaitoṟuñ cella veṇkuṭaiyiru nilaviḷāka meṅkaṇun tan(ā)tu tirunilaveṇṇilāt tika
ḻa Orutaṉimeruviṟ puliviḷaiyāṭavārkaṭaṟ ṟivān=tarattup pūvar tiṟaiviṭutta katañcorikaḷiṟu parun=talaittiṭat tana ponṉakarppuṟattiṭaik kiṭappa Iṉṉāṭpiṟkulapiṟai pol niṟpiḻaiyeneṉuñ � �ka kuṭaiticait taṉṉāḷukantu tāṉutoṉaiyum panṉāḷiṭṭap palapala mutukum payattetirmāṟiya jayapperun=tiruvum paḻiyukantu koṭutta pukaḻiṉ celviyum vāḷāroṇkaṇ maṭantaiya rīṭṭamum miḷātu koṭutta veṅkari niraiyu
ṅ kaṅkamaṇṭalamuṅ koṅkaṇatecamum pāṇiyiraṇṭum Oruvicaik koṇṭiṇṭiya pukaḻoṭu pāṇṭimaṇṭalaṅkoḷat tiruvuḷattaṭaittu veḷḷavar parittaraṅkamum poruparikkalaṅkaḷun tantiravāriyu muṭaittāy vantu vaṭakaṭal tenkaṭal paṭarvatu � tin calāpamum muttamiḻppotiyalum mattaveṅkaripaṭu maiyyaṟa caiyyamuṅ kanṉiyuṅ kaikkoṇṭaruḷit tenṉāṭṭellai kāṭṭik kaṭal malaiṉāṭṭuḷḷa cāveṟelān=tani vicumpeṟṟi māveṟiya tanvarutanittalaivaṟ kuṟukalar kulaiya
k koṭṭāṟuṭpaṭa neṟitoṟu nilaikaḷiṭṭaruḷi veṅkaimaṇṭalaṅ kaṭantu tāṅkalar kaviṅka(lama)muṅ kaṉaleri parappi vilaṅkalpol vilaṅkiya ven=tar viṭṭa veṭṭaveṅkaḷiṟṟoṭu paṭṭu mun puraḷapporutopat tuṭan puṟamukamatir varukomaṭ ṭaveṇṇilāt taḷaṟṟuṭaṉ patan=talaiyuṅkaṇuppāttalil Uyarntu paḻaṅkaṭalaṭaiyat tūrttut tiṟaikoḷār mutiruppuyattalaṅkalum pola viramun=tiyākamum viḷaṅkappār toḻac civaniṭattumaiyenat tiyākavalli Avaṉimuḻutuṭai
yāḷiruppa Avaḷuṭaṉ kaṅkai viṟṟirun=taṉa maṅkaiyar tilatam Eḻicaivallapi Eḻulakamuṭaiyāḷ vāḻimalarn=tiṉitiruppa Ūḻiyum Avaṉimuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭu viṟṟirun=taruḷiya kovirājakecaripanmarāṉa cakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅka coḻatevarkku rājarājanallūr veḷipākkiḻāṉ tevaṉ cāttanāna rājentrappallavaraiyaṉ pakkal poṉkoṇṭu Iṟaiiḻiccip poviyūṭṭākaviṭṭa nilam perumpākkiḻāṉ Aṭikaḷ veṅkaṭam Ittevarkku Irupatāvatu mutal Oḷittu poy
Ivaṉ janmam Aṟṟamaiyil Ivaṉuṭaiya nilam celvinaṅkaiyum naṅkāḷinaṅkaiyum melaittaṭiyum poliyūṭṭākak kuṭuppataṟkuk kiḻpāṟkkellai Enāti Araiyaṉ kumaraṉ kavāliyun=tampi paḻayakañcikkuṇṭilāṉ kamukatoṭṭattukka ya tampimārumuṭaiya caṉan=tāṅkikkum vaikāsaṉan vaḷḷal maṇinākaṉuṭaiya ceppukkuṟaikkum neṭuñcerikkuṭaiyāṉ Arayaṉ tirumukkoṇaṉ ceppukkuṟaikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai Uṭaiyār tiruviṟkolamuṭaiyār tirunantavaṉap puṟamānilattukkum pūveṟappoṉ Oṭaikkut teṟkum Iṉṉāṟpāṟ Ellaiyuḷḷum Akappaṭṭa nilam patinaṟu cāṇkolāl kuḻi Āyirattu munṉūṟṟemuppattoṉpate ṉān māvaraimuntirikai nilamum It
yamutum Aṭaikkāyamutum viṟakum Uḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭuvaṉattukku neyyukku tuṇiyum pālāṟṟi niṉṟun=tirumañcaṇam Arumoḻitevanāl tūṇippatakku nirkoḷḷuṅ kuṭaḻantu kuṭattil tirumañcaṇaṅ koṭuvaruvanoruvaṉukku ṉelluk kuṟuṇiyum puṭavai mutalukku nelluppatinkalamumāka Oruvarkku nāḷoṉṟukku nelluppatakkum puṭavai mutalukku nellu Irupatiṉ kalamum Āka nellu nūṟṟeṇpatiṉaiṅkalattukkum Itaṉilaṅ kaikkoṇṭu Āṇṭuvarai celu
riyiṭaippaṭṭār ceyta pāvattaip paṭuvār § Ivvūr Ūr brāhmaṇan kāśyapan caṅkaranārāyaṇaṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikkuk kuṟumuṭi maturān=takaviḻupparayaṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikkuk kuṟumuṭi caṅkan=tāḻi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikkuc caṅkaṇūr kiḻavaṉ rajasun=tirana vayiramekaṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikkuk kumāratanacerinan=ti Eḻuttu Ippaṭikkup pāṭalaṅ kiḻavaṉ tevan cūṟṟi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku paṭayyan vayarimātevaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku ceyyampākkiḻānIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 26.344 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
